comment: Single machine-readable fund thesis + evaluation criteria. Sources: sun/system-architecture.md (tech spec §8 preference model, §6 vibe check), sun/opportunity-card.md (axes, thesis fit), Martin's numeric-confidence-trust convention, laura/founder-axis-scoring.md (sub-scores). Do not duplicate these values elsewhere — pipeline and server read this file.

founderCriteria.comment: Five sub-scores per laura/founder-axis-scoring.md; weights sum to 1. Floors are ceiling traits: below floor, the founder axis is capped regardless of other scores.
combinationRules: conscientiousness is stage-dependent: never a standalone positive
high assertiveness + low emotional control reads as aggression, flag not score

evidenceRules.scale: 0-100 integers; 'unknown' only where no evidence exists
